candidates.why: 'Total Revenue' is the primary top-line revenue figure for the income statement.

candidates.row_label: Ground leases/Rental Expenses - Cost of Sales
candidates.why: This is a cost of sales component, not revenue.
This is a selling expense, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not the P&L revenue figure.
Represents deferred income, not the revenue line.

candidates.row_label: Contract Liabilities - Short-Term - Advance Consideration & Progress Billings in Excess of Unbilled Revenue
candidates.why: Contract liability, not revenue.
Deferred income on balance sheet, not the income statement revenue.

candidates.row_label: Cost of materials and traffic charges
candidates.why: This is the main cost of sales aggregate, covering materials and traffic charges; best representation of COGS.
Component of cost of sales related to network traffic; belongs in COGS.
Component of cost of sales related to materials; also part of COGS.

candidates.row_label: Ground leases/Rental Expenses - Cost of Sales
candidates.why: Explicitly labeled as cost of sales; a COGS component.

candidates.row_label: Costs of materials and traffic charge - Balancing value
candidates.why: A balancing adjustment row; should not be used as COGS per instructions to avoid balancing items.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of materials and traffic charges
Ground leases/Rental Expenses - Cost of Sales

variables.notes: Included main aggregate plus its explicit cost components; excluded the balancing value row.

candidates.why: Typical SG&A personnel/overhead expense; fits SG&A definition.
A broad bucket of operating overhead expenses; appropriate for SG&A.
This is income, not expense; should not be included as SG&A expense.
Stock-based compensation, which is an SG&A component when not in COGS.
Mixed operating income/expense bucket; acceptable as an overhead bucket when no cleaner SG&A total exists.
Balance sheet asset, not a P&L expense; should not be used for SG&A expense mapping.
Accumulated depreciation, not current SG&A expense line.
Net asset balance, not an SG&A expense.
Accumulated depreciation on admin assets, not SG&A expense line.

variables.notes: Selected multiple overhead expense buckets on the income statement; excluded income-only and balance-sheet rows.

candidates.why: Explicit research and development expense line.
Primary income statement line for interest expense; best match for gross interest cost.
Potential alternative gross interest line, but appears unused/empty here.
Capitalised interest, not the core interest expense; usually excluded from interest expense measure.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Component of interest expense related to leases; could be used, but total 'Interest Expenses' already aggregates interest cost.
Non-lease portion of interest expense; a subset of total interest expense.
Represents minority interest in profit, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests, not interest expense.
Generic label but appears unused in this preview; 'Interest Expenses' with data is preferred.
Same concept as 'Interest Capitalised'; not the primary expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental breakdown of lease interest; subset of total interest.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement expense.
Liability classification, not interest expense.
Liability class, not expense.
Balance sheet debt, not interest expense.
Liability class, not expense.
Liability description, not expense.
Liability descriptor, not expense.
Equity for minorities, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interest, not interest expense.
No such populated row in preview; and balance sheet context would not be the expense.

variables.notes: Chose the main interest expense line rather than subsets or supplemental breakdowns.

candidates.why: Represents profit attributable to equity holders, not the equity balance sheet total.
Income statement item, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of Telenor ASA
candidates.why: Represents common shareholders' equity; an appropriate measure of book equity excluding minorities.
Component of equity, but not the total book equity.
Total equity attributable to equity holders of Telenor ASA; effectively common equity and a good BE measure.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; less aligned with common shareholders' equity when MIB is modeled separately.

variables.notes: Used Total Equity (attributable to equity holders) as book equity; minorities captured separately in MIB.

candidates.why: Represents minority share of net income, but MIB should prefer balance sheet minority equity where available.
Duplicate concept of non-controlling interests on income statement.
Balance sheet minority equity; best representation of minority interest for MIB.
Duplicate label for non-controlling interest on balance sheet; using one avoids double-counting.

variables.notes: Chose the balance sheet non-controlling interest as the minority interest measure; avoided duplicate Minority Interest row to prevent double-counting.
